# Copilot instructions for `core-capital-vat`

## Build, lint, and validation commands

This repository exposes its main local workflows through `package.json` scripts and should be run with Bun:

- `bun run dev` starts the Vite dev server.
- `bun run build` runs `tsc -b && vite build`.
- `bun run lint` runs `eslint .`.
- `bun run typecheck` runs `tsc --noEmit`.
- `bun run preview` serves the built app with Vite preview.
- `bun run format` runs Prettier for `**/*.{ts,tsx}`.

There is currently no `test` script and no test runner configuration in the repository, so there is no supported single-test command yet.

## High-level architecture

- The app is a Vite + React 19 + TypeScript SPA. Entry is `src/main.tsx`, which creates a TanStack Router instance from the generated `src/routeTree.gen.ts` and renders `<RouterProvider />`.
- Routing is file-based under `src/routes/`. `src/routes/__root.tsx` is the shared shell and wraps the app in the theme provider, tooltip provider, and Sonner toaster. Add new screens as route files rather than manual route arrays.
- `src/routeTree.gen.ts` is generated by the TanStack Router Vite plugin in `vite.config.ts`. Do not hand-edit it.
- Shared UI primitives live in `src/components/ui/`. This project uses shadcn/ui with the `base-mira` style preset, Base UI primitives, and Phosphor icons (`components.json`).
- Styling is centralized in `src/index.css` using Tailwind CSS v4 imports, shadcn theme tokens, and CSS custom properties for light/dark themes.
- `src/components/theme-provider.tsx` owns theme state locally through `localStorage`, applies the `dark`/`light` class to `document.documentElement`, listens for system theme changes, and supports keyboard theme toggling with the `d` key.
- The project also includes a Convex backend scaffold under `convex/`. `convex/schema.ts` currently registers a single `users` table from `convex/users.ts`, and `convex/_generated/` contains generated API/types. At the moment, the frontend does not appear to be wired to Convex or React Query yet, so treat backend integration as prepared infrastructure rather than an active runtime dependency.

## Key conventions in this repository

- Use the `@/` path alias for app imports. It is configured in both `vite.config.ts` and `tsconfig*.json`.
- Keep routes inside `src/routes/` and let TanStack Router regenerate `src/routeTree.gen.ts`. If you add, rename, or remove route files, expect the generated route tree to change.
- Treat `src/components/ui/` and `convex/_generated/` as generated/vendor-style layers first. Prefer composing them from route or feature code instead of heavily rewriting shared primitives unless the change is intentionally global.
- Shared class composition uses `cn()` from `src/lib/utils.ts`, which wraps `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`.
- The root app shell already provides `ThemeProvider`, `TooltipProvider`, and `Toaster`; new routed pages should assume those providers exist and avoid re-registering them.
- The shadcn CLI is configured through `components.json` with aliases like `@/components`, `@/components/ui`, `@/lib`, and `@/hooks`. If adding new shadcn components, generate them into the existing structure rather than creating parallel UI folders, e.g. `bunx shadcn@latest add <component>`.
- Import ordering is enforced by Prettier via `@trivago/prettier-plugin-sort-imports` (`.prettierrc`). Prefer running `bun run format` after larger TypeScript edits.
